items.title: Every Stock Warren Buffett Has Said He'd Own Practically Forever
items.author: Keith Speights
items.description: Warren Buffett has revealed the stocks he plans to hold indefinitely, including Coca-Cola, American Express, Occidental Petroleum, and several Japanese trading companies. He also considers Apple a 'forever' stock, despite recent portfolio changes.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Buffett has praised Coca-Cola as a 'truly wonderful business' that he expects to 'maintain indefinitely'.
Buffett has lauded American Express as a 'truly wonderful business' that he plans to own indefinitely.
Buffett has aggressively bought Occidental Petroleum shares, citing the company's vast oil and gas holdings and leadership in carbon-capture initiatives.
Buffett has aggressively bought Occidental Petroleum shares, citing the company's vast oil and gas holdings and leadership in carbon-capture initiatives.
Buffett considers Apple an 'even better business' than Coca-Cola and plans to keep it in Berkshire's portfolio 'unless something really extraordinary happens'.
